ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATE_AND_DELETE_DESCRIPTIO: Deactivate your account and hide messages from people that join rooms in future
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATE_CHOOSE_TITLE: Choose an option to deactivate your account:
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATE_DESCRIPTION_2: To continue to deactivate your account, confirm your Matrix ID below.
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATE_ONLY_DESCRIPTION: Deactivate your account without hiding your existing messages
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATE_TITLE: Deactivating your account will make it unavailable for use. If you continue,
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATE_UPSHOT_1: You will not be able to log into this account.
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATE_UPSHOT_2: You will not be able to reactivate the account, as deactivation is permanent
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATE_UPSHOT_3: Your Matrix ID will become unavailable for use by everyone - including yourself
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATE_UPSHOT_4: You will leave all rooms that you have joined
ALIAS_MAKE_CANONICAL_ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not set the alias {{alias}} as the main alias for the room
ALIAS_MAKE_PUBLIC_ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not publish the alias {{alias}} to the room
ALIAS_UNPUBLISH_ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not unpublish the alias {{alias}} from the room
ALIAS_UNSET_CANONICAL_ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not remove the main alias from the room
ALIAS_UNSET_CANONICAL_ERROR_TITLE: Unable to remove the main alias
AUTH_MANUAL_LOGIN_MESSAGE: If you need it, once you have completed login in the browser, you can paste the manual login token here to log in.
AUTH_OAUTH_DESCRIPTION: Complete login in your browser, and then come back here once you're done.
AUTH_POPOVER_ADVANCED_LOGIN_TEXT: If your homeserver doesn't support server discovery, you can enter its URL here to log in.
AUTH_POPOVER_CONNECTION_ERROR_TEXT: Check your Matrix ID and try again.
AUTH_POPOVER_INITIAL_SYNC: Initial Sync in progress. This can take a while.
AUTH_SSO_MESSAGE: We've opened a browser. Go ahead and log in there, and come back when you're done.
AUTH_SSO_WAITING_FOR_TOKEN: Waiting for authentication to be completed...
BAN_DESCRIPTION: They will leave the room and won't be able to rejoin until their ban is lifted.
CHAT_BAR_NO_SEND_PERMISSION: You do not have permission to send messages in this room.
CREATE_ROOM_DESCRIPTION: Create a room to chat in
CREATE_ROOM_ENCRYPT_SUBTEXT: Once enabled, encryption cannot be disabled
CREATE_SPACE_DESCRIPTION: Create a space to collect related rooms into a group
DEVICES_LOG_OUT_INFORMATION: The device won't be able to receive or send any messages, and if it was verified, it will no longer be verified.
DEVICES_LOG_OUT_TEXT: Do you want to forcibly log out from {{device}}?
DIRECT_JOIN_ROOM_DESCRIPTION: If you know the room address or have a room link, you can join it directly.
FIX_RECOVERY_DESCRIPTION: Your local recovery data is corrupt. Your recovery key is required to continue backing up your encryption keys.
IDENTITY_RESET_DESCRIPTION: This is a drastic action intended to be used if you have lost your account's recovery methods, if you have lost access to your verified devices, or if your account is believed to be compromised.
IDENTITY_RESET_UPSHOT_1: Anyone with whom you have verified will be notified that your identity was reset
IDENTITY_RESET_UPSHOT_2: Your encryption backup will be erased, and you may lose encrypted messages you have sent in the past
IDENTITY_RESET_UPSHOT_3: You will need to verify all of your devices again
IGNORED_USERS_DESCRIPTION: If someone is disturbing you, you can add them to your ignore list. You won't see messages from them, and any invitations from them will be hidden. They will still be able to read any messages that you send, and they will continue to be present in calls.
IGNORED_USERS_NO_USERS: No users have been added to your ignore list.
IGNORE_ERROR_TEXT: Unable to add {{user}} to the ignore list
IGNORE_ERROR_TITLE: Unable to add to ignore list
INCOMING_SELF_VERIFICATION_DESCRIPTION: Verify {{device_name}} to trust it and share encryption keys. The other device will be able to decrypt your messages.
INVITE_ACCEPT_ERROR_TEXT: Unable to accept the invitation to {{room}}
INVITE_DESCRIPTION: Who do you want to invite to this room?
INVITE_ERROR_TEXT: Unable to invite {{user}} to the room
KEY_CHANGE_DESCRIPTION: If you've forgotten your recovery key, you can change it here. Your old recovery key and recovery passphrase, if set, will become invalid.
KEY_EXPORT_DESCRIPTION: Enter a password to encrypt the exported encryption keys. This password will be necessary to import these keys again.
KEY_IMPORT_DESCRIPTION: Enter the password for the key export
KEY_IMPORT_ERROR_INVALID_MAC: Check the password and try again
KEY_IMPORT_ERROR_MESSAGE: Sorry, we were unable to import the key backup.
KEY_RESET_DESCRIPTION: A recovery key will be created, and the encryption keys on the server will be replaced with the encryption keys on this device. You may lose some messages if this device does not have the encryption keys.
KEY_RESET_ERROR_MESSAGE: Sorry, we were unable to update your account's recovery key.
KEY_RESET_OK_DESCRIPTION: Your recovery key has been set up. Keep the recovery key somewhere safe, as you will need it if you lose access to all your verified devices.
KEY_RESET_PASSPHRASE: You have the option of setting up a recovery passphrase if you so desire. You can use the recovery passphrase in lieu of the recovery key to recover your encrypted messages.
KEY_RESET_PASSPHRASE_WARNING: Avoid using your account password as the recovery passphrase. If someone gains knowledge of your account password, they will be able to both log into your Matrix account, decrypt all of your messages, and will also be able to impersonate you.
KEY_RESET_WARNING: It is imperative that you save this recovery key now. You won't be able to see it again.
KEY_SETUP_DESCRIPTION: A recovery key will be created, which you can use to recover your encrypted messages in the event you log out of all of your devices.
KICK_DESCRIPTION: They will leave the room, but can rejoin if the room is public, or if they are re-invited.
LEAVE_ROOM_INFORMATIONAL_NOT_PUBLIC: You may not be able to rejoin this room unless you are re-invited.
LEAVE_ROOM_INFORMATIONAL_PUBLIC: You can rejoin this room later.
LINK_OPEN_CONFIRMATION_WARNING: Make sure it's a place you trust; the web can be scary!
LOG_OUT_WARNING: If you're not logged in anywhere else, logging out now will cause you to lose all your encrypted messages.
NEW_ACCOUNT_ONBOARDING_CROSS_SIGNING_BOO: Please try again, or contact your homeserver provider.
NEW_ACCOUNT_ONBOARDING_DESCRIPTION: This is your Matrix ID. It is your identifier on the Matrix network, and anyone can contact you using this ID.
NEW_USERNAME_DESCRIPTION: Choose a username for your account.
NO_DISPLAYED_ROOM_MESSAGE: Choose a room to start chatting!
OAUTH_MANAGEMENT_ACTION_ACCOUNT_DEACTIVA: To deactivate your account, proceed on your homeserver.
OAUTH_MANAGEMENT_ACTION_CROSS_SIGNING_RE: To reset your cryptographic identity, proceed on your homeserver.
OAUTH_MANAGEMENT_ACTION_GENERIC_TEXT: Proceed with this action on your homeserver.
OAUTH_MANAGEMENT_ACTION_SESSION_END_TEXT: To forcibly log this device out, proceed on your homeserver.
OPEN_ACCOUNT_TITLE_HOMESERVER_DESCRIPTIO: Choose a homeserver to open your account on.
PASSWORD_DESCRIPTION: Make it a good password and save it for this account. You don't want to be reusing this password.
PERMISSION_MICROPHONE_DENIED_CONTENT: theGrid needs access to your microphone. Check your privacy settings and allow theGrid to access the microphone to start a voice call.
POPOVER_RECOVERY_PASSPHRASE_DESCRIPTION: Enter the recovery passphrase for your account to verify this session. You can also use the recovery key here.
POPOVER_REPLACE_ROOM_FINAL_CONFIRM: Replacing this room will create a new room, and a message will be left in this room directing everyone to the new room. Existing messages will stay in this room, and it will be archived.
POPOVER_REPLACE_ROOM_FINAL_CONFIRM_2: Until more people join the new room, you will be the only person in it. Existing users will not join the new room automatically.
POPOVER_REPLACE_ROOM_FINAL_CONFIRM_3: You will leave this room once it has been replaced. This action is irreversible.
POWER_LEVEL_UPDATE_DEMOTION_WARNING: Once this demotion takes effect, you will not be able to undo it, as you will lack sufficient permissions to promote yourself again.
POWER_LEVEL_UPDATE_PROMOTION_WARNING: Once this promotion takes effect, you will not be able to undo it, as you will lack sufficient permissions to change the power level of {{user}}.
POWER_LEVEL_UPDATE_TEXT: What power level do you want to assign to {{user}}?
PROFILE_CHANGE_DISPLAY_NAME_DESCRIPTION: Your Display Name is shown to other users to identify you
PROFILE_MANAGE_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION: Proceed to your homeserver to see and configure additional settings.
PROFILE_UPDATE_DISPLAY_NAME: {{user}} updated their display name from {{old_name}} to {{new_name}}
PROFILE_UPDATE_DISPLAY_NAME_AVATAR: {{user}} updated their profile picture and their display name to {{new_name}}
RECOVERY_KEY_ERROR_INVALID_MAC: The recovery key or recovery passphrase is incorrect
RECOVERY_KEY_WHAT_DESCRIPTION: The recovery passphrase and key was set up when you configured key backups for your account. If you don't know your recovery passphrase or key, and you don't have any verified devices to recover from, you'll have to reset your cryptographic identity from Account Settings.
RECOVERY_PASSPHRASE_POPOVER_CORRUPT: Your account recovery data is corrupt
RECOVERY_PASSPHRASE_POPOVER_CORRUPT_MESS: The recovery data for your account is corrupt. To recover from this state, you need to reset the recovery key from a verified session that has all of your encryption data. If you don't have one, you will need to reset your cryptographic identity from Account Settings.
RECOVERY_PASSPHRASE_POPOVER_OK_MESSAGE: This session was verified with the recovery key.
REPLY_UNAVAILABLE: Reply message could not be loaded
ROOM_ALIASES_DESCRIPTION: Aliases can be used to join this room directly, if the access policy is set to Public. Public aliases can be used by anyone, whilst non-public aliases can only be used by users on your homeserver.
ROOM_ALIASES_DESCRIPTION_SPACE: Aliases can be used to join this space directly, if the access policy is set to Public. Public aliases can be used by anyone, whilst non-public aliases can only be used by users on your homeserver.
ROOM_ALIAS_DESCRIPTION: What alias do you want to set for this room?
ROOM_ALIAS_DESCRIPTION_SPACE: What alias do you want to set for this space?
ROOM_ALIAS_REMOVE_ERROR_TEXT: Could not remove the room alias {{alias}}
ROOM_CHANGE_NAME_DESCRIPTION: What do you want to call this room?
ROOM_CREATE_ERROR_TEXT: The room could not be created
ROOM_DIRECTORY_ADD_SERVER_DESCRIPTION: If you want to find communities on another server, you can enter the address of the homeserver below.
ROOM_ENCRYPTION_ENABLE_DESCRIPTION:
By enabling encryption, you will prevent anyone joining the room from being able to read message history. If there are any bots or services in this room, they may also stop working.

Once enabled, encryption cannot be turned off.

Do you want to enable encryption for this room?
ROOM_HEAD_TEXT: Welcome to the beginning of the room.
ROOM_REPLACE_DESCRIPTION: Replacing the room can be done to reset the state of the room if the room is unstable. It can also be used to upgrade the room to a new version to take advantage of new features and improvements in newer room versions.
ROOM_STATE_ALIASES_UPDATED: {{user}} updated the public aliases for the room
ROOM_STATE_HISTORY_VISIBILITY_REDACTED: {{user}} changed who can see historical messages in the room
ROOM_STATE_JOIN_RULES_INVITED: {{user}} allowed people to see messages from when they were invited
ROOM_STATE_JOIN_RULES_JOINED: {{user}} allowed people to see messages from when they joined the room
ROOM_STATE_JOIN_RULES_REDACTED: {{user}} changed the access rules for the room
ROOM_STATE_JOIN_RULES_SHARED: {{user}} allowed people in the room to see all messages since the room was created
ROOM_STATE_JOIN_RULES_WORLD_READABLE: {{user}} allowed anyone to see all messages in the room, even if they are not currently in the room
ROOM_STATE_ROOM_AVATAR: {{user}} changed the picture for the room
ROOM_STATE_ROOM_NAME: {{user}} changed the name of the room to {{new_name}}
ROOM_STATE_ROOM_NAME_REDACTED: {{user}} changed the name of the room
ROOM_STATE_ROOM_TOPIC: {{user}} changed the topic for the room
ROOM_STATE_SPACE_PARENT_REDACTED: {{user}} added the room to a space
ROOM_TOMBSTONED_TEXT: Join the new room to keep the conversation going.
SECURITY_IDENTITY_DESCRIPTION: Your cryptographic identity allows you to build a network of devices and users that you can verify and trust.
SECURITY_IDENTITY_DESCRIPTION_2: If you have lost access to all of your verified devices, or if you suspect that an unauthorised device has gained access to your Matrix account, you can reset your cryptographic identity to clear out your verified devices.
SECURITY_KEY_BACKUP_DESCRIPTION: If you'd like, you can back up the keys used to encrypt your secure messages. You can import these keys into another Matrix client in order to grant it access to decrypt your messages.
SECURITY_KEY_EXPORT_WARNING: Keep this file and the password guarded. Anyone who gets access to this file and the password will be able to decrypt your messages.
SERVER_NOTICE_ROOM_CONTENT: Notices from your homeserver will appear in this room.
SETUP_RECOVERY_DESCRIPTION: Set up a recovery key for your account so you don't lose access to your encrypted messages
SPACE_CHANGE_NAME_DESCRIPTION: What do you want to call this space?
SPACE_CREATE_ERROR_TEXT: The space could not be created
SPACE_SIDEBAR_NO_ROOMS_MESSAGE: You haven't joined any rooms in this space. Check out the lobby to find rooms to join!
TOMBSTONE_JOIN_ERROR_TITLE: Unable to join the replacement room
UIAA_BROWSER_AUTH: To continue, complete authentication in your web browser.
UIAA_ERROR: There was a problem authenticating with the homeserver.
UIAA_PASSWORD_AUTH: To continue, confirm your account password.
UNBAN_DESCRIPTION: They will be able to rejoin the room and can rejoin if the room is public, or if they are re-invited.
UNBAN_TEXT: Do you want to lift {{user}}'s ban?
UNGNORE_ERROR_TITLE: Unable to remove from ignore list
UNIGNORE_ERROR_TEXT: Unable to remove {{user}} from the ignore list

UNVERIFIED_DEVICES_DESCRIPTION.one: {{count}} unverified device has access to your account. Verify it to share encryption keys, or log it out to maintain account security.
UNVERIFIED_DEVICES_DESCRIPTION.other: {{count}} unverified devices have access to your account. Verify them to share encryption keys, or log them out to maintain account security.

VERIFICATION_CANCEL_REASON_ACCEPTED: The verification request was accepted on a different device.
VERIFICATION_CANCEL_REASON_MISMATCHED_SA: Verification failed because the displayed emoji could not be confirmed on both devices.
VERIFICATION_CANCEL_REASON_TIMEOUT: Verification failed because the verification process took too long to complete.
VERIFICATION_CANCEL_REASON_UNKNOWN_METHO: Verification failed because the negotiated verification method is not supported.
VERIFICATION_CANCEL_REASON_USER: Verification was cancelled from the other device.
VERIFICATION_CANCEL_REASON_USER_IS: Verification was cancelled by this device.
VERIFICATION_CANCEL_UNEXPECTED_MESSAGE: Verification failed because an unexpected message was received.
VERIFICATION_POPOVER_AWAITING_OK_SPINNER: Waiting for other device to respond...
VERIFICATION_POPOVER_AWAITING_OK_TEXT: We sent a verification request to that device. Go ahead and accept it on that device to continue.
VERIFICATION_POPOVER_AWAITING_OK_US_TEXT: We sent a verification request to all of your other devices. Go ahead and accept the verification request on one of your other verified devices to continue.
VERIFICATION_POPOVER_EMOJI_ONLY_TEXT: Verify by comparing emoji on both devices.
VERIFICATION_POPOVER_EMOJI_TEXT: If you can't verify using another method, you can complete verification by comparing emoji on both devices.
VERIFICATION_POPOVER_OK_MESSAGE: Your device is now verified, and encryption keys have been shared.
VERIFICATION_POPOVER_QR_SCAN_TEXT: Scan this QR code with the other device to continue.
VERIFICATION_POPOVER_RECIPORICATE_ACK: The QR code was scanned successfully
VERIFICATION_POPOVER_RECIPORICATE_NAK: The QR code was not scanned successfully
VERIFICATION_POPOVER_RECIPORICATE_TEXT: Was the QR code scanned successfully on the other device?
VERIFICATION_SAS_DECIMAL_DESCRIPTION: Check on the other device and ensure that these numbers are displayed, in the same order.
VERIFICATION_SAS_EMOJI_DESCRIPTION: Check on the other device and ensure that these emoji are displayed, in the same order.
VERIFY_SESSION_DESCRIPTION: Verify this session to access encrypted messages sent from other devices.
VERIFY_SESSION_DESCRIPTION_ADDITIONAL: Until you verify this device, you can't verify any other devices. If you don't have another device to verify with, head to the Security settings for other options.
VERIFY_SESSION_RESET_CRYPTO_DIALOG_MESSA: If you can't verify this session because you've lost access to all your other verification methods, you can reset your cryptographic identity to start over. You will lose access to your existing encrypted messages, and all of your devices will become unverified.
